title: Eliminate responsive desktop UI overlap
forbidden_changes: Backend compiler, Provider, persistence, or public IR changes
Hiding required controls or status text to avoid overlap
Adding horizontal page scrolling as a layout workaround
Interactive hit areas smaller than 40 by 40 pixels
Removing visible failure or progress information
deliverables: Non-overlapping page headers, cards, tables, and action groups
Predictable long-text wrapping and truncation rules
Viewport regression evidence and task completion report
acceptance_tests: Tasks, Collections, Notes, Settings, and Process remain usable without horizontal overlap from 900 to 1920 CSS pixels
Long Chinese titles, paths, status messages, and button labels cannot cover adjacent controls
Primary actions remain visible and interactive at the minimum supported window size
Dynamic counters use stable numeric widths and do not shift surrounding layout
Svelte check and production frontend build complete with zero errors and zero warnings
Existing Rust and repository validation gates remain compatible
security_requirements: Responsive rendering must not introduce unsanitized HTML
Layout changes must not expose secrets or local path contents beyond existing views
